markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify the HX programmatic SEO project plan and resolve blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blocker:** The project is stalled by an unclear page template. The current sketch is a text-heavy list, but the client likely expects a more visual layout (tables, icons) to avoid a "wall of text."](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Ownership Gap:** The client owns design, but their slow pace (e.g., 4 months for blog images) risks delaying this project. GrowthX must deliver content soon, creating a "chicken and egg" problem.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Bailey will consult directors (Andy, Kyle) to define a standard process for projects where GrowthX owns content and the client owns design.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Topics

### Project Context & Blocker

  - [**Goal:** Launch a programmatic SEO (pSEO) campaign for HX on insurance pricing factors.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Status:** Bailey is finalizing the site map and page list by EOW, confirming which topics warrant dedicated pages based on search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The page template is unclear. The current sketch is a simple list of H3s, but the client likely expects a more visual layout to avoid a "wall of text."](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Risk:** This ambiguity prevents Kirkland from building an automated content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

### Proposed Solution & Rationale

  - [**Recommendation:** Kirkland proposed a manual proof-of-concept (POC) before building a pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Method:** Use Claude to generate a full page for a new Line of Business (LOB) based on the existing template.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Use this POC to get explicit client feedback on the desired layout and content structure.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach avoids the complexity of past projects (e.g., VAPI) where GrowthX owned design, which proved to be a "nightmare."](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

### Process Gap & Resolution

  - [**Problem:** No standard process exists for projects where GrowthX owns content and the client owns design.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Bailey will consult directors (Andy, Kyle) to define this process and unblock the HX project.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:** Consult directors (Andy, Kyle) to define a standard process for projects with client-owned design.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Update the Linear ticket with the agreed-upon process and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/a881Pu3ixY_y8hHB2D1YbVv_h8ds1vV-?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
